setting: 進路のことで親に言えず、親友に夜電話する
lyrics:
Patience
All of this will make sense
Oh, I gotta say less
I know full well
I’ll never tell
How I been feeling alone

Oh, I need you like water my love
Some things never change
Maybe I'm thinking out loud
Need a reason or sign from above
My love, my love
Distance
Nothing learned is painless
Missing all of my friends
They’ll never know
I'm losing control now
I'm really feeling it now

Oh, I need you like water my love
Some things never change
I'm barely breathing right now
Need a reason or a sign from above
My love, my love
See me
Save me now
I'm bleeding out
Heal me
Hold me now
See me
Save me now
I'm bleeding out
Heal me
Hold me now
I'm really feeling it now

Oh, I need you like water my love
Some things never change
I'm barely breathing right now
Need a reason or sign from above
My love, my love

lyricsJa.ja: 辛抱して

lyricsJa.en: All of this will make sense
lyricsJa.ja: これも全部、いつか意味がわかる
ああ、あまり多くは言わないでおかないと
よくわかってる
僕はきっと打ち明けない
どれだけ孤独を感じてきたかなんて

lyricsJa.en: Oh, I need you like water my love
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、愛しい人、君が水みたいに必要なんだ
変わらないものもある
もしかしたら、考えていることを声に出しているだけなのかも

lyricsJa.en: Need a reason or sign from above
lyricsJa.ja: 理由か、天からのしるしが欲しい
愛しい人、愛しい人
距離がある
痛みなしに学べることなんてない
友達みんなが恋しい
彼らにはきっとわからない
今、自分を保てなくなってる
今、本当にそれを感じてる

lyricsJa.en: Oh, I need you like water my love
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、愛しい人、君が水みたいに必要なんだ
変わらないものもある
今は息をするのもやっとだ

lyricsJa.en: Need a reason or a sign from above
lyricsJa.ja: 理由か、天からのしるしが欲しい
愛しい人、愛しい人
僕を見て
今、僕を救って
傷ついて、もう限界なんだ
癒して
今、抱きしめて
僕を見て
今、僕を救って
傷ついて、もう限界なんだ
癒して
今、抱きしめて
今、本当にそれを感じてる

lyricsJa.en: Oh, I need you like water my love
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、愛しい人、君が水みたいに必要なんだ
変わらないものもある
今は息をするのもやっとだ

lyricsJa.en: Need a reason or sign from above
lyricsJa.ja: 理由か、天からのしるしが欲しい
愛しい人、愛しい人

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I keep telling myself, Patience, but I don't know how much longer I can act normal.
sentences.displayHtml: I keep telling myself, Patience, but I don't know how much longer I can act normal.

conversation.japanese: ずっと「我慢しろ」って自分に言い聞かせてるけど、あとどれくらい普通のふりができるかわからない。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Is this about school again?
sentences.displayHtml: Is this about school again?

sentences.text: Or is it more than that?
sentences.displayHtml: Or is it more than that?

conversation.japanese: また学校のこと？それとも、もっと大きい話？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It's all of this.
sentences.displayHtml: It's all of this.

sentences.text: School, my parents, the future.
sentences.displayHtml: School, my parents, the future.

sentences.text: I feel trapped.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel trapped.

conversation.japanese: 全部だよ。学校も、親のことも、将来のことも。閉じ込められてる感じがする。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then stop trying to sound fine.
sentences.displayHtml: Then stop trying to sound fine.

sentences.text: Tell me how you've been feeling for real.
sentences.displayHtml: Tell me how you've been feeling for real.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ、平気そうに話そうとしなくていいよ。本当はどう感じてるのか話して。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I don't know.
sentences.displayHtml: I don't know.

sentences.text: Maybe I'm thinking out loud, but I don't think this path is mine.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe I'm thinking out loud, but I don't think this path is mine.

conversation.japanese: わからない。ただ声に出して考えてるだけかもしれないけど、この道は自分のものじゃない気がする。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I think you already know that.
sentences.displayHtml: I think you already know that.

sentences.text: And I know full well you've been scared to say it.
sentences.displayHtml: And I know full well you've been scared to say it.

conversation.japanese: たぶん君はもうわかってるんだと思う。それを言うのが怖かったことも、私はちゃんとわかってる。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Yeah.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah.

sentences.text: Every time I try to explain it, I think, I gotta say less, or they'll get disappointed.
sentences.displayHtml: Every time I try to explain it, I think, I gotta say less, or they'll get disappointed.

conversation.japanese: うん。説明しようとするたびに、余計なことは言わない方がいいって思うんだ。がっかりされそうで。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe you're waiting for a sign from above, but you might not get one.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe you're waiting for a sign from above, but you might not get one.

conversation.japanese: 天からのサインみたいなものを待ってるのかもしれないけど、そんなものは来ないかもしれない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: That's what scares me.
sentences.displayHtml: That's what scares me.

sentences.text: If I choose wrong, it's on me.
sentences.displayHtml: If I choose wrong, it's on me.

sentences.text: I feel like I'm losing control.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel like I'm losing control.

conversation.japanese: それが怖いんだ。間違えたら、自分の責任になる。自分を保てなくなりそう。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I get it.
sentences.displayHtml: I get it.

sentences.text: But Nothing learned is painless.
sentences.displayHtml: But Nothing learned is painless.

sentences.text: If this hurts, maybe it means you're finally being honest.
sentences.displayHtml: If this hurts, maybe it means you're finally being honest.

conversation.japanese: わかるよ。でも、痛みなしに学べることなんてないのかも。苦しいなら、それはやっと本音に向き合ってるってことかもしれない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'm so tired, Lily.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm so tired, Lily.

sentences.text: I feel like I'm barely breathing.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel like I'm barely breathing.

conversation.japanese: もう疲れたよ、Lily。息をするのもやっとな気がする。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then don't decide everything tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: Then don't decide everything tonight.

sentences.text: Just breathe, and tomorrow we'll figure out the first sentence together.
sentences.displayHtml: Just breathe, and tomorrow we'll figure out the first sentence together.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ今夜、全部決めなくていい。まず息をして。明日、最初に何を言うか一緒に考えよう。

thumbnailSource: Luke Chiang - Never Tell Official Music Video
